raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, I made a payment to Citbank for my CitiXXXX credit card. 
The payment was {$300.00}. The balance on my card was then {$920.00}. 
Two additional ( seemingly arbitrary ) payments then posted to my checking account. 
One transaction was in the amount of {$150.00}, the next was in the amount of {$760.00}. 
I did not authorize these transactions. I received a transaction verification for the {$300.00} payment, but not for the unauthorized transactions. The total of these two transactions was {$920.00}, so now I have a credit on my credit card= my balance is- {$300.00} There is no offer of resolution from Citi for this issue. Their solution is to reverse the transactions within 7-10 business days. 
The entirety of their resolution is unacceptable. They are not operating within the parameters of the financial agreement.
